info.DAtuviSezaH: ayaM DAtuH akarmakaH asti  ataH asya prayogaH karmapadena saha na karaRIyaH  yaTA 'gaNgA yamunayA milati' iti sADuprayogaH  DAtupAWe vidyamAnaH 'mil SlezaRe' 6.91 iti aparaH DAtuH tu akarmakaH asti
info.english_meaning: to unite to join to get together
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' mila saMSlezaRe iti paWitasyeha punaH pAWaH kartraBiprAye taNarTaH iti AtreyaH ' iti mA.DA.vfttiH  kzIrasvAmI tu amuM na paWati  ' Sleze milet saNgame tu milate milatIti ca ' (Slo. 160) iti devaH
